markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance, resolve technical issues, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** Two articles delayed by a code formatting bug will be published this week, bringing the total to nine.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [**Comparison Pages:** The large comparison table will be removed from high-traffic pages to boost performance. A full removal is preferred over a toggle to avoid engineering overhead.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:** A data discrepancy was resolved: GrowthX-created content is growing, but overall site LLM traffic is declining. The team will now analyze all URLs to find growth opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [**Renewal & Pilot:** The contract renewal is in validation. Strapi will pilot GrowthX's new self-serve product to reduce engineering bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Quality

  - [**Publishing Schedule:** Two articles were delayed by a code formatting bug (code escaping the formatter).](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
      - [**Resolution:** The bug fix is in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
      - [**Impact:** Nine articles will be published this week instead of the usual seven.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [**Video Quality Control:** Incorrect, outdated V4 videos were embedded on the high-traffic WordPress and Contentful comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [**Action:** Victor fixed the two pages.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [**Preventative Action:** GrowthX will audit all comparison pages this week to ensure videos are current and relevant.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Add videos (migration stories or V5 getting-started guides) to top-performing, text-heavy pages to improve digestibility.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

### Website Issues & Performance

  - [**Integration Page Logos:** Logos are missing from the main landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [**Status:** The issue is a low priority due to a website bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**Comparison Table Removal:** The large table at the top of comparison pages will be removed to boost performance.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [**Decision:** A full removal is preferred over a toggle button to avoid engineering overhead.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [**Fallback:** If removal is too complex, the table will be moved to the bottom of the page.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [**October Performance (YTD):**](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [**Pace:** On track to match or outpace September for non-branded impressions and conversion events.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [**Top Performers:** VS Code Extensions and Next.js for SEO articles.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The May conversion peak was an unintended side effect of a massive, temporary increase in non-branded search traffic from bad forum links.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)

### LLM Traffic Analysis

  - [**Data Discrepancy:** A conflict between Victor's and Vivek's LLM traffic data was resolved.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**Cause:** Vivek's chart was filtered to show only GrowthX-created URLs, which are growing.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**Clarification:** Overall site LLM traffic is declining, which is a concern as it should be growing with general LLM usage.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** The team will now analyze LLM traffic across *all* URLs to identify growth opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

### Renewal & Product Pilot

  - [**Contract Renewal:** The renewal contract is in validation on Strapi's end.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Product Pilot:** Strapi will pilot GrowthX's new self-serve product.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To reduce engineering bottlenecks and enable the Strapi team to self-serve content updates.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [**Status:** GrowthX is aware of Strapi's interest and will provide a timeline for the pilot.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
      - [Fix the code formatting bug to enable publishing the two delayed articles.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
      - [Audit all comparison pages to ensure videos are current and relevant.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [Analyze LLM traffic across all URLs to find growth opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [**Strapi:**](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [Remove the large comparison table from high-traffic pages (fallback: move to bottom).](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [Finalize validation of the renewal contract.](https://fathom.video/share/RhqXVTssQgnQ24uJh8LeVQBRxjBcNXTL?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
